samples.xml_description:
<module id="traffic_light">
    <description>Implement a traffic light with red, yellow, green indicators and a pedestrian button. In normal traffic light operation, the east-west (EW) cycle is 60 clock cycles of green, 5 clock cycles of yellow, 10 clock cycles of red, and the north-south (NS) cycle is 10 clock cycles of green, 5 clock cycles of yellow, 60 clock cycles of red. The pedestrian button, when pressed, reduces the remaining green time to 10 clocks if the remaining time is greater than 10 clocks. If the remaining green time is less than 10 clocks, the green time is not changed. The lane light and the sidewalk light are paired. When the lane light is green or yellow, the sidewalk light is red. When the lane light is red, the sidewalk light is green.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="pass_request">Pedestrian button.</input>
        <output id="red">Red output signal.</output>
        <output id="yellow">Yellow output signal.</output>
        <output id="green">Green output signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum name="idle">Idle state.</enum>
        <enum name="s1_red">State 1 red.</enum>
        <enum name="s2_yellow">State 2 yellow.</enum>
        <enum name="s3_green">State 3 green.</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="cnt" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit counter.</reg>
            <reg id="state" width_description="[1:0]">2-bit state.</reg>
            <reg id="p_red">1-bit pedestrian red.</reg>
            <reg id="p_yellow">1-bit pedestrian yellow.</reg>
            <reg id="p_green">1-bit pedestrian green.</reg>
            <always>
                <case>
                    <if value="state==idle">Idle state.</if>
                    <if value="state==s1_red">State 1 red.</if>
                    <if value="state==s2_yellow">State 2 yellow.</if>
                    <if value="state==s3_green">State 3 green.</if>
                </case>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <if value="!rst_n">Reset counter.</if>
            <else>
                <if value="pass_request && green">Reduce green time.</if>
                <else>
                    <if value="!green && p_green">Maintain green time.</if>
                    <else>
                        <if value="!yellow && p_yellow">Maintain yellow time.</if>
                        <else>
                            <if value="!red && p_red">Maintain red time.</if>
                        </else>
                    </else>
                </else>
            </else>
        </sequential_logic>
        <always>
            <assign id="clock">cnt.</assign>
        </always>
        <always>
            <case>
                <if value="!rst_n">Reset outputs.</if>
                <else>
                    <if value="!red && p_red">Set red output.</if>
                    <else>
                        <if value="!yellow && p_yellow">Set yellow output.</if>
                        <else>
                            <if value="!green && p_green">Set green output.</if>
                        </else>
                    </else>
                </else>
            </case>
        </always>
    </logic_description>
    <task>
        <if value="!rst_n">Reset task.</if>
        <else>
            <if value="!green && p_green">Maintain green task.</if>
            <else>
                <if value="!yellow && p_yellow">Maintain yellow task.</if>
                <else>
                    <if value="!red && p_red">Maintain red task.</if>
                </else>
            </else>
        </else>
    </task>
</module>
